cityLanding.metaDescription: Browse houses, apartments, land and commercial properties in {city}, {state}. Compare prices, schedule visits and simulate financing on RSC Market.
cityLanding.metaKeywords: properties {city}, houses {city}, apartments {city}, land {city}, real estate {city} {state}, buy property {city}, rent {city}

hero.title: Properties in {city}, {state}
hero.subtitle: Discover verified listings from trusted agencies and developers. Search by neighborhood, property type, price range and financing options.

stats.financingBody: Simulate installments and submit financing requests for properties in {city}.

intro.title: Real estate market in {city}
intro.p1: {city} is one of Brazil's most active real estate markets in {state}. On RSC Market you can explore houses, apartments, land plots and commercial spaces with transparent pricing and direct contact with verified sellers.
intro.p2: Whether you are buying your first home, investing in rental income or relocating for work, filter listings by transaction type, bedrooms, area and neighborhood to find options that match your budget and lifestyle in {city}.
intro.p3: Use our interactive map, save favorite listings, compare properties side by side and schedule in-person visits — all without leaving the platform.

categories.title: Browse by property type in {city}
categories.subtitle: Jump straight to the category you need with pre-applied city filters.

featured.title: Featured properties in {city}
featured.subtitle: A selection of current listings available in {city}, {state}.

0.question: How do I search for properties in {city}?
0.answer: Use the search button above or browse by property type. Filters for price, bedrooms, transaction (buy or rent) and neighborhood are applied automatically for {city}, {state}.

1.question: Are the listings in {city} verified?
1.answer: RSC Market works with verified agencies and developers. Listings marked as verified have been reviewed by our team. You can also report suspicious ads directly from the property page.

2.question: Can I finance a property in {city}?
2.answer: Yes. Use RSC Credit to simulate down payment, term and monthly installments. You can submit a financing request linked to a specific listing in {city} or run a general simulation.

3.question: How do I schedule a visit in {city}?
3.answer: Open any listing in {city} and click Schedule visit. Choose a date and time; the agency receives your request and confirms availability. Your visits are saved to your dashboard.

4.question: Does RSC Market cover all neighborhoods in {city}?
4.answer: Coverage grows as new agencies join. Search by neighborhood on the map or use the AI search bar to describe what you need — for example, a three-bedroom apartment near the city center of {city}.

stats.financingBody: Simulate installments and submit requests for vehicles in {city}.

intro.title: Automotive market in {city}
intro.p1: {city} offers a wide range of cars, SUVs, motorcycles and commercial vehicles. On RSC Market you compare prices, mileage and financing options transparently.
intro.p2: Filter by brand, year, fuel type and price range to find the right vehicle in {city}, {state}. Save searches and get email alerts when new matches appear.
intro.p3: Use the map, save favorites, compare up to three vehicles and chat with sellers — all in one place.

categories.title: Browse by type in {city}
categories.subtitle: Jump to a category with city filters already applied.

featured.title: Featured vehicles in {city}

0.question: How do I search for vehicles in {city}?
0.answer: Use the search button above or pick a vehicle type. Price, year, brand and fuel filters are applied for {city}, {state}.

1.question: Are listings in {city} verified?
1.answer: We work with partner dealerships. Verified listings are reviewed by our team. You can report suspicious ads on the vehicle page.

2.question: Can I finance a vehicle in {city}?
2.answer: Yes. Use the financing simulator on the vehicle page or visit Financing to estimate installments before submitting a request.

3.question: How do I compare vehicles?
3.answer: Click the compare icon on cards to add up to three vehicles. Your list is saved in the dashboard under Compare.

4.question: Does coverage include the whole {city} area?
4.answer: Inventory grows as new dealerships join. Use the map and city filters to refine results in {city} and nearby areas.

hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.subtitle: Find answers, contact support, and open our full privacy and terms policies.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about RSC Market.

0.question: How do I create an account?
0.answer: Click Register in the header or go to the sign-in page. You can sign up with Google or email. Your account lets you save favorites, schedule visits, and chat with sellers.

1.question: How do I recover my password?
1.answer: On the sign-in page, use Forgot password? Enter your email and open the reset link we send you. If you signed up with Google, continue using Google to access your account.

2.question: How do I manage my favorites?
2.answer: Tap the heart icon on any property or vehicle card while signed in. Access all saved items from the Wishlist link in the header or your dashboard.

0.question: How do I search for properties or vehicles?
0.answer: Use the global search in the header or browse Imóveis and Veículos sections. Apply filters for type, price, location, and more, then click Search to see results.

1.question: Can I save a search?
1.answer: Yes. After running a search on the properties page, use Save search in the results panel. Saved searches appear in your dashboard for quick access.

2.question: How do I change my region or market?
2.answer: Use the region switcher in the header to select your country or market. Listings, currency, and available services adapt to your selected region.

0.question: How do I contact a seller?
0.answer: Open a listing detail page and use the chat or contact options. Sign in to send messages and receive replies directly on the platform.

1.question: How do I schedule a visit?
1.answer: On a property detail page, choose Schedule visit, pick an available time, and confirm. You will receive a confirmation and can track visits in your dashboard.

2.question: How does property comparison work?
2.answer: Use the compare icon on up to three property cards. Open Compare in your dashboard to review specs side by side before deciding.

0.question: How can my company join RSC Market?
0.answer: Visit For Business and complete the registration form. Our team reviews your application and grants access to the company dashboard once approved.

1.question: What can I do in the company dashboard?
1.answer: Manage listings, respond to leads, track analytics, and communicate with buyers — all from a single verified business panel.

2.question: Is there a cost to list as a business?
2.answer: Plans vary by size and market. See pricing on the For Business page or contact our team for enterprise options.

0.question: Is my personal data protected?
0.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and follow applicable privacy regulations. Read our Privacy policy for full details.

1.question: How are listings verified?
1.answer: Partner agencies and verified sellers go through a review process. Look for the Verified badge on listings and company profiles.

2.question: How do I report suspicious activity?
2.answer: Contact support@rscmarket.com with the listing link and details. Our trust and safety team reviews reports promptly.

hero.title: How REESKOVA works
hero.subtitle: Learn how to explore the marketplace, contact companies, and move forward with a purchase. RSC connects; negotiation and paperwork stay between the parties.

whatIs.title: What is Reeskova
whatIs.body: Reeskova is the technology marketplace where companies publish properties, vehicles, and services for millions of people to discover and explore.

marketplace.title: How the Marketplace works
marketplace.body: Search, filter, and compare listings. When something stands out, contact the listing company directly from the platform.

whoPublishes.title: Who publishes listings
whoPublishes.body: Only verified companies — agencies, builders, dealerships, banks, and partners — manage listings from the Backoffice. Consumers do not publish.

purchase.title: Purchase process
purchase.body: Explore, contact, visit, and negotiate directly with the company. Contracts, payments, and paperwork are handled by buyer and company.

financing.title: Financing process
financing.body: Some listings show credit options offered by partner companies. Approval and agreements are between you and the financial institution.

legal.title: Legal information
legal.body: RSC / Reeskova is a publishing and connection platform. We do not intermediate contracts, custody funds, or handle legal paperwork.

flow.title: The journey in 6 steps
flow.subtitle: RSC only publishes offers and connects. Everything else you resolve directly with the company.
flow.disclaimer: Important: RSC does not handle paperwork, sign contracts, custody money, or close deals. Negotiation, visits, documentation, and delivery are exclusively between client and company.

search.title: Search
search.description: Explore properties and vehicles published by companies in the marketplace.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Message or request contact with the listing company from the platform.

visit.title: Visit
visit.description: Coordinate the visit directly with the company. RSC does not organize paperwork.

negotiate.title: Negotiate
negotiate.description: Agree on price and terms between you and the company, without RSC intermediating.

close.title: Close
close.description: Contracts, payments, and paperwork are managed by client and company.

publish.title: Companies publish
publish.description: Companies manage their listings from the Business Portal / Backoffice.

0.q: Can I publish a listing as an individual?
0.a: No. Listings are managed only by partner companies from the Backoffice.

1.a: No. Reeskova connects buyers with companies. Negotiation and closing stay between the parties.

2.q: How do I contact a company?
2.a: From any listing you can request contact, chat, or a visit directly with the advertiser.

3.a: Some companies publish credit options. The financial agreement is between you and that institution.

4.q: Where can I find institutional information?
4.a: In Help, About RSC Group, and the legal pages linked from the footer.

common.contactBody: Write to our support team at

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how REESKOVA (RSC Market), operated within the RSC Group ecosystem, collects, uses, and protects personal data when you use our marketplace for properties, vehicles, and services.

paragraphs.0: REESKOVA / RSC Market acts as the controller of personal data processed through the platform for account management, publishing, discovery, messaging, visits, and related marketplace features.
paragraphs.1: For privacy requests, contact support@rscmarket.com. We respond within the timeframes required by applicable law (including LGPD in Brazil and GDPR where it applies).

paragraphs.0: We collect only what is needed to operate the marketplace and the features you choose to use.

bullets.0: Account data: name, email, authentication identifiers, and profile preferences.
bullets.1: Usage data: searches, saved listings, region/market selection, device and log information.
bullets.2: Communications: messages with sellers, visit requests, and support tickets.
bullets.3: Business data (companies): legal/trade name, tax ID where required, contact persons, and listing content you publish.

paragraphs.0: We process personal data to provide and improve the platform, keep accounts secure, enable contact between buyers and verified advertisers, personalize region/currency experiences, and comply with legal obligations.
paragraphs.1: We do not sell personal data. We share information with verified partners or service providers only when necessary to deliver a feature you requested (for example, routing a lead to an advertiser) or when required by law.

paragraphs.0: REESKOVA is a publishing and connection platform. Contracts, payments, financing agreements, and legal paperwork are handled directly between you and the company or institution involved—not by RSC as an intermediary.
paragraphs.1: Advertisers and partner institutions are independent controllers of data they receive from you outside our systems. Review their privacy notices when you share information directly with them.

paragraphs.0: We use cookies and similar technologies for authentication, preferences (such as region), security, and performance. Details are described in our Cookies policy.

We retain data only as long as necessary for the purposes above, legitimate business needs, or legal retention duties. We apply industry-standard technical and organizational measures, including encryption in transit and access controls.

Subject to applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, portability, restriction, or objection to certain processing. You may also withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.
paragraphs.1: To exercise these rights, email support@rscmarket.com with enough detail for us to verify your request. You may also contact your local data protection authority if you believe your rights were not respected.

paragraphs.0: Because RSC Market serves LATAM+ markets, data may be processed in countries other than your own. Where required, we use appropriate safeguards for cross-border transfers.
paragraphs.1: We may update this policy to reflect product or legal changes. The “Last updated” date at the top will change when we do. Material changes may also be communicated in-product or by email when appropriate.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: These terms govern access to and use of REESKOVA / RSC Market. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to this agreement.

paragraphs.0: REESKOVA is a premium marketplace where verified companies publish properties, vehicles, and services, and buyers discover, contact, and advance their purchase journey.
paragraphs.1: RSC / REESKOVA is a publishing and connection platform. We do not intermediate contracts, custody funds, or handle legal paperwork between parties.

paragraphs.0: You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials secure. Businesses must complete onboarding and maintain truthful company and listing data. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or applicable law.

Listing content, prices, availability, photos, and descriptions are provided by advertisers. Always confirm material details directly with the company before purchasing, renting, financing, or visiting.
paragraphs.1: You may not publish unlawful, misleading, infringing, or abusive content. We may remove content or restrict access to protect users and platform integrity.

paragraphs.0: Any sale, rental, financing, insurance, or service agreement is solely between you and the relevant company or institution. RSC is not a party to those agreements and does not guarantee third-party performance or listing condition.
paragraphs.1: Optional tools (for example financing simulations or partner services) may redirect you to independent providers with their own terms.

bullets.0: Do not scrape, attack, or overload the service beyond normal use.
bullets.1: Do not harass users, spoof identity, or attempt unauthorized access.
bullets.2: Do not use the platform for fraud, money laundering, or other illegal activity.

paragraphs.0: The REESKOVA / RSC Market brand, interface, and software are owned by RSC Group or its licensors. Advertisers retain rights to their listing content and grant us a license to host and display it on the platform.

The platform is provided on an “as available” basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, RSC is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the marketplace or from dealings with third parties.
paragraphs.1: Nothing in these terms limits rights that cannot be waived under consumer or data-protection law in your jurisdiction.

paragraphs.0: We may update these terms periodically. Continued use after changes become effective constitutes acceptance. For questions, contact support@rscmarket.com.

cookies.title: Cookies policy
cookies.intro: This policy describes how REESKOVA / RSC Market uses cookies and similar technologies on the website and related apps.

paragraphs.0: Cookies are small files stored on your device. They help the site remember preferences, keep sessions secure, and understand how the product is used.

bullets.0: Essential: authentication and session continuity (for example sign-in cookies).
bullets.1: Preferences: region/market selection and similar UX settings.
bullets.2: Security and integrity: fraud prevention and abuse detection signals.
bullets.3: Performance (when enabled): aggregated metrics to improve reliability and speed.

paragraphs.0: You can control cookies through your browser settings (block, delete, or alert on new cookies). Blocking essential cookies may prevent sign-in or other core features from working.
paragraphs.1: Where required by law, we will present additional consent choices before non-essential cookies are set.

paragraphs.0: For how we process personal data more broadly, see our Privacy policy. Questions: support@rscmarket.com.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.intro: REESKOVA operates a marketplace that prioritizes verified business participation, transparent publishing, and responsible use across LATAM+ markets.

paragraphs.0: Companies requesting access undergo onboarding review. We may request corporate identification (such as tax IDs where applicable), contact validation, and listing quality checks before or during publication.
We work to detect fraudulent listings, misuse of messaging, and policy violations. Users can report suspicious activity to support@rscmarket.com with listing links and relevant details.

We design product practices to align with applicable privacy, consumer, and electronic commerce rules in the markets we serve. Because RSC does not intermediate contracts or payments, regulated financial or notarial acts remain with licensed third parties.

REESKOVA is part of the RSC Group ecosystem. Optional connections to financing or other partner services are presented clearly; those partners remain responsible for their own licensed activities and compliance programs.

about.title: About RSC Group & REESKOVA
about.intro: REESKOVA is the premium marketplace brand for properties, vehicles, and services—powered by RSC Group.

paragraphs.0: We connect verified companies with buyers across LATAM+ through a single digital marketplace. Our model combines B2B SaaS tools for advertisers with a B2B2C discovery experience for buyers.
paragraphs.1: We monetize software and distribution—not commissions on closed deals. Publishing and connection are our core jobs.

paragraphs.0: We are not a brokerage desk, escrow agent, or law firm. We do not intermediate contracts, custody funds, or replace the legal process between buyer and seller.

RSC Group brings together technology and complementary services so companies can publish inventory, manage leads, and offer related experiences (such as financing options when available) without fragmenting the buyer journey across unrelated portals.
General support: support@rscmarket.com. Companies can request onboarding from the For Business flow or the Business Portal.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We build marketplace infrastructure for real-economy assets. If you care about product craft, trust, and LATAM+ scale, we want to hear from you.

paragraphs.0: Small, senior-leaning teams. Clear ownership. Product decisions grounded in how agencies, dealerships, and buyers actually operate—not vanity metrics alone.

bullets.2: Go-to-market, partner success, and trust & safety operations.

paragraphs.0: Email careers@rscmarket.com (or support@rscmarket.com with subject “Careers”) including your CV/portfolio, preferred role, and location/timezone. We review applications on a rolling basis and respond when there is a potential match.
paragraphs.1: We do not charge candidates fees and we do not ask for payments during recruitment.

guides.title: Guides
guides.intro: Practical starting points to use RSC Market as a buyer or as a company.

bullets.0: Browse properties and vehicles, apply filters, and save favorites while signed in.
bullets.1: Open a listing to chat with the advertiser or request a visit.
bullets.2: Confirm price, documents, and conditions directly with the company before any commitment.

bullets.0: Request onboarding from For Business, then manage listings and leads in the Business Portal.
bullets.1: Keep inventory accurate—photos, price, and availability drive conversion.
bullets.2: Respond quickly to chats and visit requests to protect your reputation on the marketplace.

paragraphs.0: Read How it works for the end-to-end journey, visit the Help center FAQ for common questions, and review Privacy and Terms for legal details.

security.title: Security
security.intro: Protecting accounts, listings integrity, and personal data is foundational to REESKOVA.

bullets.0: Encryption in transit and controlled access to production systems.
bullets.1: Authenticated sessions and secure cookie practices for sign-in.
bullets.2: Monitoring for abuse, spam, and suspicious listing patterns.

bullets.0: Use a unique password and keep your email account secure.
bullets.1: Never send payment to individuals claiming to “hold funds for RSC”—we do not custody buyer funds.
bullets.2: Confirm company identity on verified profiles and report anomalies to support.

paragraphs.0: Email support@rscmarket.com with “Security” in the subject. Include steps to reproduce, affected URLs, and whether personal data may be involved. Please do not publicly disclose vulnerabilities before we can assess and remediate.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or was moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or return to the home page.
